texto: A knowledge with no clear idea of Evil as universe and principle, a knowledge that pays no mind to the evil that man is and was and for which he is forced to atone, is knowledge with a view to Evil, in favor of Evil, and probably suggested by Evil.
explicacao: Citação de Ceronetti sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A knowledge with no clear idea of Evil as universe and principle, a knowledge that pays no mind t…” articula reflexao, evil, knowledge em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
